backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that exposes a public query function to transform HTTP outcall inputs using the OutCall module.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the update of the booking form submission endpoint to use a new Google Apps Script web app URL, affecting BookingForm.tsx and multiple components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and configuration files for the Veda Healar Vedic wisdom consultation website.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives and CSS custom properties defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and UI component colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the Veda Healar application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component configuring TanStack Router with routes for Home, About, Services, BookConsultation, Testimonials, and Contact pages, wrapped in a Layout with Navbar, Footer, WhatsAppButton, and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/AboutIntro.tsx: About introduction section component displaying Veda Healar's mission with three feature cards (Authentic Vedic Practice, Personalized Guidance, Proven Results) and scroll reveal animation.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: Booking form component with validation that submits consultation data (name, email, phone, date, time, service, message) to Google Apps Script endpoint using React Query mutation with no-cors mode.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with brand info, contact details including WhatsApp link to +91 7096912557, quick navigation links using TanStack Router, social media icons, disclaimer, and Caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section component with cosmic background, mandala overlay, animated sparkle icon, headline text, CTA buttons for booking and services, and a scroll indicator.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed navigation bar with logo, desktop/mobile menus, scroll-based styling changes, active link highlighting, and a "Book Now" CTA button.
frontend/src/components/PaymentPlacehold: Placeholder component displaying payment method options (Razorpay, Stripe, UPI, Bank Transfer) with security messaging and commented integration structure for future implementation.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCard.tsx: Reusable service card component with icon, name, description, price, and "Book Now" link that uses scroll reveal animation and accepts service details as props.
frontend/src/components/ServicesOverview: Services overview section displaying five service cards (numerology, name correction, lucky numbers, reiki, business name) in a responsive grid with scroll animations and a "View All Services" link.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSlid: Auto-rotating testimonials carousel with manual navigation arrows, star ratings, quote styling, and mandala background overlay showing client feedback.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating WhatsApp contact button in bottom-right corner that opens WhatsApp chat with pre-filled message and phone number.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, using React Query for caching and automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity storage, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Reserved file for React Query hooks to interact with backend; currently empty with commented example structure since booking submits directly to Google Sheets.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollReveal.ts: Custom React hook using IntersectionObserver to detect when elements enter viewport and trigger reveal animations, unobserving after first visibility.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens (colors, radius) for light/dark themes, plus utility animations (fadeInUp, fadeInLeft, fadeInRight) and custom scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider for React Query and ICP authentication.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page describing Veda Healar's mission to bridge Vedic wisdom with modern spiritual guidance, featuring scroll-reveal animations and sections on story, mission, and guiding principles.
frontend/src/pages/BookConsultation.tsx: Consultation booking page with form for scheduling online sessions, displaying booking details, payment placeholder, and success confirmation state after submission.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page displaying location, WhatsApp, email, business hours, and social media links with scroll-reveal animations and call-to-action for booking consultations.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component composing HeroSection, ServicesOverview, AboutIntro, and TestimonialsSlider components into the main landing page layout.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services page component displaying a grid of 5 spiritual services (numerology, name correction, lucky numbers, reiki healing, business name analysis) with hero section, service cards, and CTA to book consultation.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials page component showing 6 client reviews in a grid layout with ratings, service types, and testimonial text, plus a CTA section linking to the booking page.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palette (deepBlue, goldAccent, beigeBackground), shadcn UI design tokens, custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), and animation keyframes for accordions.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking the Veda Healar booking application architecture using Google Apps Script backend webhook to append form submissions to Google Sheets, with one completed feature for updating the submission endpoint URL.
